concerns.text: FR-004 ('System MUST frame all reported findings as ASSOCIATIONAL...') is anchored to US-2, but US-2 focuses on model training and validation mechanics (CPU usage, split ratios). The requirement to frame findings as associational is a reporting/interpretation constraint that logically belongs to US-3 (Evaluation) or a dedicated 'Reporting' story, as US-2 does not produce 'findings' to frame.

The final item in the Assumptions section is a functional requirement ('The system MUST include a dynamic validation check...') with a specific threshold (≥100 records) and logic (flag/exclude). It is currently unanchored to any User Story (US-1, US-2, or US-3) and lacks an FR/SC ID. It should be moved to the Functional Requirements section (e.g., FR-006) and explicitly anchored to US-3 (Evaluation) or US-1 (Data Acquisition) where the check logically occurs.
